transcript.clean_text: often one of the most exciting days on the cycling calendar the Sun Sean as paranis came to a conclusion for the eighth and final stage today pogachar in the yellow Jersey and 12 seconds separating first and second in the general classification just 118 kilometers long but packed with hills from start to finish live all Chateau pay and then the signature Hill of bahinis coldest up and down all day not a moment trust bite and a chance to turn the tables in the GC for the king of the mountains competition it wasn't yet decided but Jonas griego got out in the break early on took the first three climbs and assured himself of a prize he'd been chasing since the first day the Danish Rider taking the polka dot Jersey another Danish Rider Jonas vengo was seemingly a little bit far back to turn things around in his GC yellow Jersey challenge 55 kilometers to go and the Breakaway was breaking up several different Riders have tried to get out there different groups have been in front and then what Paul's attacked from the Peloton he'd bridge over to the five Riders who were already there and ride straight past them as the race headed up into the pretty Hills behind the French city in the southeast of the country Paul's living locally in Monaco would know these roads well but so would half of the Peloton one more climb in an intermediate Sprint to go he had a gap of 35 seconds but it wouldn't last too long other Riders caught the Breakaway were unhappy that pogacha's team wanted to Win Again David de la Cruz twice a winner of this stage wouldn't be given an opportunity to win a game intermediate sprint times saw the Gap reduced Paul's out there Gordo trying to take bonus seconds off pogacha but it backfired but gotcha taking four godu only taking two and the Gap in the GC between first and second increasing from 12 to 14 seconds pulse was caught with just over 25 K's to go as the Riders then raced into the foot of the mighty cold as Felix core shartner was doing a job to try and set up for gacha for a third stage of the week when Simon Yates attacked Yates having gone at almost identically the same part of the climb last year he won the stage then but he would be looking on as pogachar attacked hat in front this time just under 19 kilometers remained when pogacha hit the front pedal Stroke by pedal stroke on cold is he rode away the scene of a famous time trial to end the race on many an occasion he was riding as if it was a race against the clock 50 seconds plus his Gap at the top the Gordo group working together but unable to really bring back any time with over a minute gudu and Company back to 43 seconds bogacha able to pull off the procession logatcha now winning over 50 percent of the races on the road he'd Taken part in this season taking about a hat-trick of stages and after having taken the Trident of the master of the two seas in tirenor for the past two years he was now the prince of the Pomade Zangle albeit six more victories behind King Kelly the Record Man groups came in behind they'd fight for the GC places much of the top 10 unchanged in terms of positions but the time gaps grew it was handshakes all round pogachar on top in this early season go do finishing second thingago in the third position yet another stage race win and another line of his role of Honor complete that apogacho winning the stage by just over 30 seconds and the biggest GC winning margin for quite a number of years as well on the podium together three early favorites going towards the Tour de France but there's a lot of time for that to change until July 53 seconds the margin of victory at the end of the week over guldu 139 servingagor with Yates showing well early season as well a good performance from maida who finishes in fifth place today pogacho not only the race winner but also the points classification winner the king of the mountains was Jonas craigo still qualifying for the best Young Riders Jersey at the age of 24. three stages three jerseys a GC win and another performance as he blasted off once more to Planet pog inis now has a new winner is that man
